MINI MINUTES: Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick; Clerk: M. Sison; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, John Steward Company is represented by Janet Thompson.
Attorney, John P. Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Kevin Hansen, is present.
Attorney, Raymond Bolanos, representing the defendant through limited scope.
Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept.304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-20-2010 is vacated.
